## ICP rubric (kit/icp-filter.md)

| Gate | Score / 20 | Note |
|---|---|---|
| Funding | | |

## Verdict

- [ ] `loom-now` (85+)
- [ ] `loom-soon` (70–84)
- [ ] `park` (50–69)
- [ ] `cut` (under 50)

## Disqualifiers

- [ ] No public layoffs in last 90 days
- [ ] No public spat / departing C-suite
- [ ] No existing brand studio retainer
- [ ] Not B2C
- [ ] Not in a sanctioned country

## The Loom hook

One sentence — the verdict that will land in beat 2 of the audit Loom.
